title: TriageDecision
description: The expected triage output for a single ticket.

ticket_id.description: Must match the input ticket_id exactly.

category.description: The issue category. Expected values: 'Access & Authentication', 'Hardware & Peripherals', 'Network & Connectivity', 'Software & Applications', 'Security & Compliance', 'Data & Storage', 'General Inquiry', 'Not a Support Ticket'.

priority.description: Priority level. P1 = Critical, P2 = High, P3 = Medium, P4 = Low.

assigned_team.description: The specialist team to route to. Expected values: 'Identity & Access Management', 'Endpoint Engineering', 'Network Operations', 'Enterprise Applications', 'Security Operations', 'Data Platform'.

needs_escalation.description: True if the ticket requires escalation beyond normal routing (security incidents, VIP, repeat failures, compliance).

missing_information.description: Information missing from the ticket that is needed for resolution. Use only values from the enum. Empty array if the ticket is complete.

next_best_action.description: A single sentence describing the most important next step for the assigned team.

remediation_steps.description: Ordered list of specific, actionable remediation steps an L1 analyst should follow.
